artifactBrief.audience: Tech-savvy professionals interested in AI tools

artifactBrief.subjectDomain: AI technology, software tools, innovation, collaboration
artifactBrief.artifactThesis: The SVG hero concept should visually represent the cutting-edge nature of AI tools while emphasizing their practical applications in a professional setting.
styleDirectives: Use clean lines and minimalistic design elements to convey simplicity and efficiency.

Ensure the color scheme is tech-forward with shades of blue and white for a professional look.

fileWrites.contentPreview:
<svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 800 600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><title>Tech-savvy professionals interested in AI tools - AI technology, software tools, innovation, collaboration</title><desc>The SVG hero concept should visually represent the cutting-edge nature of AI tools while emphasizing their practical applications in a professional setting. Key concepts: AI, tools, innovation, collaboration, technology. Anchors: AI-driven solutions, efficiency gains, data analysis, user-friendly interfaces.</desc>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="techGradient" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#007BFF" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#6495ED" />
    </linearGradient>
